text: You have selected the largest possible area.
You have selected a very large area.
You have selected a large area.
Choose a smaller area if you experience lag.
translation: 지연이 발생하면 더 작은 영역을 선택하십시오.

text: You have selected the smallest possible area.
You have selected a narrow area.
It might be difficult to find resources.
You have selected an area with salt water.
It might be very difficult to survive here.
translation: 이곳에서의 생존이 매우 어렵다는 것을 의미합니다.

text: You have selected an area with a heavy aquifer.
It might be very difficult to obtain stone here.
translation: 여기선 돌을 구하기 매우 어려울 수 있습니다.

text: You have selected an area with a light aquifer.
Water might need to be pumped out or carried away.
translation: 물을 퍼내거나 옮겨야 할 수도 있습니다.

text: Your selected civilization is dead or dying.
Your dwarves might assume important positions.
translation: 당신의 드워프는 중요한 직책을 맡을 수 있습니다.

text: You have selected an area near a necromancer's tower.
You may be invaded very early by powerful foes.
translation: 초반부터 강력한 적들의 침략을 받을 수 있습니다.

text: Click "Embark" to place your fortress.  Right click to zoom out.
translation: 포트리스를 배치하려면 "정착"을 클릭하십시오. 마우스 오른쪽 버튼을 클릭하면 축소됩니다.

text: Cannot embark entirely on water or mountains.
translation: 물이나 산으로만 이루어진 곳에 정착할 수 없습니다.

text: You have selected a savage area.
The wildlife might be very dangerous here.
translation: 이곳의 야생동물은 매우 위험할 수 있습니다.

text: You have selected an evil area.
You may find very unpleasant environs here.
translation: 이곳의 환경은 매우 불쾌할 수 있습니다.

text: Start immediately with the default skills, equipment, and animals.
translation: 기본 기술, 장비, 동물을 가지고 즉시 시작합니다.

text: Choose your own skills, equipment, and animals.
Click on the map to embark!  Right click to abort.
Click the map to zoom in and choose your embark location.
translation: 지도를 클릭하여 확대하고 정착 위치를 선택하십시오.

text: or hold+drag the middle mouse button.
translation: 혹은 마우스 가운데 버튼을 누르며 드래그 하십시오.

text: Prepare using a saved embark profile:
Keep world and return to main menu
